Portfolio

Every image in this portfolio represents a unique story, a genuine connection, or a moment that deserved to be remembered.

My goal is to create photographs that are authentic, timeless, and filled with emotion. From portraits and family sessions to special events and everyday moments, I approach each session with creativity, attention to detail, and a commitment to capturing memories naturally.

As you explore my work, you'll find a collection of moments that reflect real people, real emotions, and lasting memories. I hope these images not only showcase my photography but also inspire you to imagine how your own story could be captured.

Thank you for taking the time to browse my portfolio. I look forward to the opportunity to create something meaningful with you.

Got questions?

Things people ask

Everything you need to know before booking your session with MH Captures/Media.

Still unsure?

We offer a free 15-minute consultation call before you commit to anything.

▾ Book a free call
We recommend booking at least 4–6 weeks in advance for portrait sessions, and 6–12 months ahead for weddings. That said, we do accommodate last-minute requests when availability allows — just reach out and we'll see what we can do.
Your $30 deposit secures your date and is applied toward your total balance. The remaining amount is due 7 days before your session. The deposit is fully refundable if you cancel more than 14 days out, and transferable to a new date at any time.
Portrait sessions are delivered within 48 hours. Wedding galleries are delivered within 3 weeks. Commercial work timelines are agreed upon during the brief — rush delivery is available for an additional fee.
Absolutely. We shoot on location across the London, Ontario area. If your preferred location is outside our standard area, an additional travel fee may apply depending on the distance. Include your preferred spot in the notes when booking and we'll confirm any extra charges before finalizing your session.
At this time, physical prints and albums are not available. All edited images are delivered digitally through your private online gallery as high-resolution downloads, ready for you to print wherever you like.
For outdoor sessions, we monitor the forecast closely. If conditions look unfavourable, we'll reach out 48 hours ahead to discuss rescheduling — no fees involved. Overcast days are actually wonderful for portraits, so we often proceed with light cloud cover.
